title: 327 (corvette group)
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Otheruses|327}}
[[File:327_1_X-Wing_CD.jpg|250px|thumb|Corvette ''327'' 1]]
'''327''' was a group of two [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] that served in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. They were part of the [[Task force/Legends|task force]] that was led by the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] during [[Operation Strike Fear]]. While mustering in the [[Dellalt system/Legends|Dellalt system]] they were identified as carrying [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] repair parts by a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] reconnaissance mission flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] in a lone [[R-22 Spearhead starfighter|R-22 Spearhead]].

Reinforced by a third ship, an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]], they later participated in the [[retreat from Gallofree]] where all three ships of Corvette group ''327'' were destroyed.
